title: Premier Housewares Round Wall Clock - Matt Red
features: Tell the time in style with the practical wall clock
Featuring a bold red frame, the clock will add a splash of colour in your kitchen or dining room
Care instructions: Wipe clean with a soft cloth; do not use abrasive cleaners
H x W x D: 36 x 36 x 6 cm
description: Better late than never, but never late is better and with the vivid red wall clock, you can keep track of time while enhancing the look of your room. The clock is made from durable yet lightweight plastic that will stand the test of time. The sleek red frame helps to bring focus to the white face which contrasts against the red numbers and hands making it easy to read, even at a glance. Stylish and practical, the chic wall clock will complement all decors. Premier Housewares offers a wide, varied selection of home accessories at competitive prices. Our products are unique, statement pieces that will bring character, glamour and style into your home. Premier Housewares are one of the UK’s leading suppliers and distributors of housewares and home lifestyle products to the retail trade. With an extensive portfolio that covers kitchenware, tabletop and bathroom accessories, as well as soft furnishing, decorative accessories, lighting and occasional furniture, our aim is to provide a complete solution to your housewares retailing needs by offering a comprehensive collection of co-ordinating products.
